creator: henning.matyschok@outlook.com
text:
to:      HQ EUCOM
         J2 (Intelligenc)
         Unit 30400
         APO AE 09131

 I have no direct access to clean / fresh water and / or food, since
 I had rejected recruitment attempts from representatives of a local
 company, but the herassement does not stop:

  (a) There were and / or are tries to prohibit civil rights by attempted
      declaration me as disabled person.

  (b) Hair put / placed in rooms, every time, after entering the flat.

  (c) Water and food is contaminated by (in liquid) resolved hair, regularely.

  (d) It is not possible to send text-messages (e. g. via SMS) and not possible
      to realize phone-calls by the newly purchased cell-phone, after the
      predecessor was stolen at a local supermarket.

  (e) Automatic teller machines are compromised and / or disabled, since, when
      they are tries to use those properly for its purpose.

  (f) It is not possible to purchase clean salmiak based products, e. g. for
      decontaminating water and / or cleaning the flat, clothes.

  (g) It is not possible avoid purchasing faked products, e. g. sweets,
      chocolate-bars, utilities for cleaning (NaCl without additives),
      etc..

  (h) Stalking.

  (i) 20211008, central-office for postal-services were met with the aim to send
      a letter (ID: RR 7342 5064 7DE) to the U.S. Embassy in Berlin.

      Thus, at 20211011, the central-office for postal-service were met again
      therfore aimed to know about if this letter was sent out and / or reached
      its recipient the U.S. Embassy in Berlin.

      Nobody at central-office for postal-services in Flensburg, Germany employed
      personal were capable to control this by their rules of engagement and / or
      by their utilized system.

  (j) Monday, 20211018, a new letter (ID: RR 7158 8028 2DE) was sent out by
      office for postal-services in Husby, Flensburger Str. 58, Husby, GER-24975
      to its recipient the

        U.S. Embassy in Germany, Clayallee 170, Berlin, Germany.

       Payment for delivery (mail) was at 20211018  1145h maps-to ID:

           81014537

        TSE: 9802/21948 maps-to ID: 00158971

        Transaction-ID: 9802 @ 20211018 1145h47sec
        Signature-CNT: 21948 @ 20211018 1145h47sec

  (k) Thursday, 20211118, the central-office for postal-services in Flensburg,
      Germany was met again - hopefully the letter with acknowledged receive

       ID: RR 8479 3972 5DE

       TSE: 21532/46657 maps-to 00150413 @ 1348h

      was sent out to its recipient the

       Ramstein Air Base, Ramstein-Miesbach, GER-66877

      successfully.

  (l) Tueseday, 20211123, the registered letter with acknowledged receive

       RR 8479 3972 5DE

      was sent with extended ID

       RR 84 793 072 5DE 112

      and finally

       F1 010C D28B
       00 2334 153C

      back, reason: recipient not found. The reason was labeled and / or
      notified by label

       912-510-100 [19/11]

      with following message (german)

       "Empfaenger/Firma unter der angegebenen Anschrift nicht zu ermitteln."

      on front of the envelope.

  (m) Wednesday, 20211124, the central-office for postal-services, Flensburg was
      met with the purpose to send a registered letter with acknowledged receive

       ID: RR 8479 3208 5DE

      to

       HQ EUCOM, J1, Kurmacherstrasse Gebaeude 2304, 70569 Stuttgart, Germany.

      Handoff at POS is still documented by following credentials:

       "81011092 8758 24.11.21 15:08"

      Futhermore, payment at POS was performed at 1513h by;

       (i)      "81011092 24.11.2021 15:13"

       (ii)     TSE: 22150/48004

       (iii)    TSE-Start/End: 24.11.2021 15.08:23/15:13:52

       (iv)     EAS-S/N: 00150413

      Hopefully, this letter receives its recipient successfully.

  (m) Thursday, 20211125, the office of a locally operating financial institute
      the so called Deutsche Bank Corp., Flensburg, was met at 1739h 48sec with
      the aim to exchange 98,69EUR into Danish Crowns: therefore, 700,0DKK was
      the outcome of this operation and / or transaction:

       (i)      ID: 61741276895251121 @ 20211125

       (ii)     IFN 6174127 01 SOE 617 425636800 *98,69EUR

       (iii)    617 004262200 VER 17:39:48 25.11.21 6895

  (n) The letter with acknowledged receive

       ID: RR 8479 3208 5DE

      to

       HQ EUCOM, J1, Kurmacherstrasse Gebaeude 2304, 70569 Stuttgart, Germany.

      was sent with extended ID

       RR 84 793 208 5DE 112

      and finally

       F1 010C D28B
       00 2334 1F16

      back, reason: non admis. The reason was labeled and / or
      notified by label

       CN15

      with following message (german)

       "Nicht zulaessig."

      on front of the envelope.

  (k) Wednesday, 20211208, the central-office for postal-services, Flensburg was
      met with the purpose to send an international registered letter with
      acknowledged receive

       ID:    RR847935555DE
       Dest.: US

      from

       USAF, Henning Andersen Matyschok, Wasserlooser Weg. 5, 24944 Flensburg, Germany

      to

       HQ EUCOM, J1, Kurmacherstrasse Gebaeude 2304, 70569 Stuttgart, Germany.

      Handoff at POS is still documented by following credentials:

       "81011270 08.12.21 14:33"

      Futhermore, payment at POS was performed at 1433h by;

       (i)      "81011270 08.12.21 14:33"

       (ii)     TSE: 16739/37242

       (iii)    TSE-Start/End: 08.12.2021 14:32:23/14:33:54

       (iv)     EAS-S/N: 00150332

      Hopefully, this letter receives its recipient successfully.


 Henning Andersen Matyschok, 120179M11214, USAF
 
USAF
Henning Andersen Matyschok
Wasserlooser Weg 5
Flensburg
24944 Germany
